studies.title: Randomised, multicentre, controlled, double-blind, prospective study to evaluate the superiority of the Smoke Free App compared to standard therapy in dependent smokers

_verification.reason: The study specifically evaluates the 'Smoke Free App' for smoking cessation, which matches the product 'Smoke Free - Rauchen aufhören'. The trial registration mentions 'Smoke Free 23 GmbH' as the affiliation, confirming the manufacturer as the developer.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a randomized, controlled, double-blind, prospective trial comparing two groups, which fits the definition of an RCT with random allocation to intervention and control groups under controlled conditions.
